title: Update DESIGN.md §Display Name Canonicalization
description: Why: security invariant must be documented for future contributors. What: add a new section to DESIGN.md explaining that bidi controls are rejected, ZWS chars stripped, NFC applied, names trimmed and length-checked at write time in the relay before storage or broadcast. This is load-bearing — a contributor who removes this guard removes a security invariant.
acceptance_criteria: DESIGN.md has new §Display Name Canonicalization section
